title: Daoist Canon: Yuanshi Tianzun: Original Heavenly Worthy Scriptures (Section 5)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Yuanshi Tianzun: Original Heavenly Worthy Scriptures
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Yuanshi Tianzun: Original Heavenly Worthy Scriptures

translation.text: From the Yuanshi Tianzun: Original Heavenly Worthy Scriptures of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
